environment: clean checkout of the public PSn00bSDK repository at the recorded psnoobsdk-master-head commit
host compiler and toolchain prerequisites selected from the public PSn00bSDK repository documentation
no proprietary Sony SDK files, runtime library discs, or private game assets committed to this repository
public-safe sample program or toolchain smoke test
local build transcript and compatibility notes captured as derived metadata
steps: clone or update the public PSn00bSDK source repository listed in the artifact record
verify the local checkout commit against the psnoobsdk-master-head snapshot record
identify compiler, assembler, linker, and emulator or hardware-test boundaries from public repository documentation
build the open-source SDK components without using proprietary Programmer's Tool files
compile a minimal public-safe sample when available
record build commands, diagnostics, produced libraries or tools, and compatibility boundaries as public metadata
promote repeatable commands into the PS1 Programmer's Tool clean-room compatibility packet
public_notes: Planned clean-room reproduction recipe for building PSn00bSDK as a public PS1 compatibility lane without redistributing proprietary Programmer's Tool material.
